description: Full Stack Engineer building performant web applications and developer tools. Currently crafting interfaces at Vercel

hero.name: Alex Chen
hero.title: Full Stack Engineer
hero.p1: building performant web applications and developer tools. Currently crafting interfaces at Vercel
hero.p2: Previously shipped products at Linear, Stripe, and early-stage startups. I care about clean code, fast load times, and thoughtful UX.
hero.p3: When not coding, you'll find me contributing to open source, writing about web performance, or exploring new frameworks.

items.description: UI elements for Astro using a hybrid model: zero-JS Astro + progressive enhancement with web components.

items.name: EmoteShowcase

Building the frontend cloud. Working on the dashboard, deployment infrastructure, and developer experience.
Shipped real-time sync, keyboard-first interactions, and performance optimizations.
Designed payment flows and merchant dashboards. Led the migration to React 18 and improved CI/CD pipelines.
First engineering hire. Built the core product from scratch using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
